description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image ghcr.io/maxking/mailman-ci-runner:latest for all jobs. Define five jobs—coverage, diffcov, docs, qa, and tests—each in the default test stage, executing the specified tox environments. The coverage job runs `tox -e py39-cov,py310-cov,py311-cov,py312-cov`; the diffcov job runs `tox -e py39-diffcov,py310-diffcov,py311-diffcov,py312-diffcov`; the docs job runs `tox -e docs`; the qa job runs `tox -e qa`; and the tests job runs `tox -e py39-nocov,py310-nocov,py311-nocov,py312-nocov`. No additional services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
